text:
うむ、クラフトを
行ってみたようじゃな。
ああ、結果は気にしなくていい。

クラフトというものに
触れてみることが重要なんじゃ。
技術は段階を踏んで学べばよい。

興味があったらまたわしに
話しかけるといい。
それで

Hm, yes. You've indeed Crafted
something--don't concern yourself
over the results for now.

What is of utmost importance is that you've
experienced the act of Crafting something. Your
skills will develop as you continue to progress.

If you find yourself intrigued, come speak with
me again. For now, farewell.
